opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't catch my breath when I lie down, and my legs feel so heavy and swollen I can barely lift them.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Breathing has become much worse over the last two days, he can no longer lie flat to sleep, and his legs have swollen up badly, prompting him and his spouse to seek urgent advice.

symptom_narrative.onset: a gradual decline in what he can manage over the past month, with a sharp worsening of his breathing over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: about a month of getting more easily puffed, then the last two days much worse - now breathless even at rest and unable to lie flat
symptom_narrative.character: breathlessness, a sense of not being able to fill his lungs when lying down, and heavy, swollen legs that feel like they weigh him down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that he is now mostly stuck in the chair and is sleeping sitting up in a recliner because lying down makes his breathing worse
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: breathing trouble in the chest; swelling in both legs, up to around the knees
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse when lying down and at night - he wakes up suddenly feeling like he can't breathe; needs three pillows now to get any sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting upright helps him breathe a little easier
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat, and any walking or moving between rooms leaves him very breathless
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe tiredness and generalised weakness, and he thinks he has put on weight quite quickly; denies chest pain and denies fever or cough
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he has been treated for a heart condition before and takes regular tablets for it, but says it has not been this bad before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: now largely chair-bound; his spouse is struggling to help him with basic moving around and transfers

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a heart condition he takes tablets for
past_medical_history.how_managed: takes regular heart tablets every day and says he has not missed them

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: worried about being a burden on his spouse, who is struggling to help him move; keen to avoid hospital if he can

communication_style.typical_message_style: speaks in short sentences and gets breathless talking; spouse may add detail on his behalf
